features.name: packed struct with split_var attribute causing false circular logic
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with the split_var attribute applied, where a struct member is assigned to an intermediate signal and that signal is used to compute another struct member

features.name: packed struct reduction via unary operator
features.description: Code should include a packed struct used in a reduction operation (OR reduction) as a single operand

features.name: feedback path from struct member to intermediate signal and back
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned from a struct member that is subsequently used to compute a different struct member, creating a data dependency
